segments.text: What if your entire C-Suite never slept… never quit… and cost less than one intern? Meet thirteen twenty-five A-I.
Thirty-three agentic employees. One subscription. Zero excuses.
This is Kayla — your A-I Chief Executive Officer. She leads the workforce, sets strategy, and makes every agent move in lockstep.
Behind her? Nine specialist Kaylas — Operations, Finance, Marketing, Revenue, Tech, Growth, Legal, I-R, and more.
Finance. Bookkeeping, taxes, invoicing, collections, forecasting — all automated, all in real time.
Marketing. Content, social, S-E-O, email, and brand design — published daily, on-brand, on-message.
Operations. Customer support, scheduling, vendors, quality, and H-R — running twenty-four seven.
Growth. Lead research, outbound S-D-R, funnel optimization, and partnerships — fueling your pipeline.
Community. Reviews, P-R, events, loyalty, and ambassadors — building the tribe around your brand.
Your Capabilities Score: ninety-four out of one hundred. Top-tier coverage across every business function.
Versus the competition? It's not even close. ChatGPT gives you one assistant. We give you thirty-three agents working together.
Hiring a real C-Suite costs over two million dollars a year. We deliver the same firepower for two ninety-nine a month.
Do the math. You replace roughly four full roles. You save twelve thousand, one hundred dollars every single month. That's your R-O-I — instantly.
This is the future of business — and it's already here. Visit thirteen twenty-five dot A-I and meet your team today.
Thirteen twenty-five A-I. Your entire C-Suite. One subscription.
